creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 248397
dmesg

On my Latitude 7280, a resume results in iichiid0 starting to generate >1000 interrupts per second.  Enabling debug makes it print out "iichid0: no data received" repeatedly.  Any cursor movement fixes it, so it's a low priority bug :)

Full dmesg included, not sure which lines might be relevant.
